references.text:
[Py93] Pyber, L\'{a}szl\'o, Asymptotic results for permutation groups. (1993), 197--219.
 
 [RoTr25] C. Roney-Dougal and G. Tracey, Subgroups of symmetric groups: enumeration and asymptotic properties. arXiv:2503.05416 (2025).

remarks.text:
A problem of Erd\H{o}s and Tur\'{a}n.

Let $f(n)$ count the number of subgroups of $S_n$. Pyber \cite{Py93} proved that\[\log f(n) \asymp n^2.\]Roney-Dougal and Tracey \cite{RoTr25} have proved that\[\log f(n)=\left(\frac{1}{16}+o(1)\right)n^2.\]

statement.text: Give an asymptotic formula for the number of subgroups of $S_n$. Is there a statistical theorem on their order?
